calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Antonia Castellucci and Defendant, Yvonne Pittmen appeared in pro per. Also present, Property Manager, Maria Castelluci. The Case settled per written stipulationm. Trial date is vacated.
